summary: Frontend testing of War Room sidebar widgets: TODAY'S BOSS, DIG SITE TARGET, WAR PHASE COUNTDOWN, UI text changes, language switch. All 12 specified features tested.

ui_bugs.issue: In RU mode, 'AIRCRAFT DAY' label inside the boss widget is not translated to Russian (shows 'AIRCRAFT DAY (НЕ ВАШ БОНУС)' - day-type text remains English)
text-5xl large week number class not found in DOM - week is 'WEEK NOT DETECTED' due to cpt-hedge.com being unreachable, so large number display cannot be verified. Expected behavior per spec.

action_items: LOW: Consider translating 'AIRCRAFT DAY' / 'TANK DAY' etc. in TodaysBossWidget to Russian when RU lang is active (currently shows mixed RU+EN)
seed_data_creation: Server 1042 profile set via setup page
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://war-ops-ai.preview.emergentagent.com. Setup: enter server 1042, click ENTER WAR ROOM. Desktop sidebar shows all new widgets. All data-testids present: todays-boss-widget, dig-site-widget, war-countdown-widget. Today is Saturday (Aircraft/Mutant Bulldog day), boss shows NOT YOUR BONUS for Tank user. Season week shows WEEK NOT DETECTED (external API unreachable - expected). RU translations working for all labels except 'AIRCRAFT DAY' sub-text in boss widget.

test_results.todays-boss-widget visible: PASS - shows MUTANT BULLDOG (Aircraft day) with NOT YOUR BONUS for Tank user
test_results.dig-site-widget visible: PASS - shows TARGET: BEAR (DIG SITES WEAK TO TANK)
test_results.war-countdown-widget visible: PASS - shows NEXT WAR: WEDNESDAY 12:00 ST IN 3D 18H
test_results.season-week-large-number: PARTIAL - widget present but week not detected (external API unreachable, expected)
test_results.counter-intel-gone: PASS - no BEATS: or WEAK TO: text in DOM
test_results.topbar-server-only: PASS - shows S-1042, no TANK badge
test_results.placeholder-text: PASS - 'What do you need help with today?'
test_results.ru-translations: PASS - БОСС СЕГОДНЯ, МЕСТО РАСКОПОК, ФАЗА ВОЙНЫ, СЛЕДУЮЩАЯ ВОЙНА, ФОКУС СЕГОДНЯ all correct
test_results.war-countdown-format: PASS - shows day name (WEDNESDAY) and time (3D 18H)
